text.content:
Recently, MSCI, a globally recognized index provider, released its latest ESG ratings, upgrading Sailun Group’s ESG rating from A to AA. This significant achievement allows Sailun Group to maintain its leading position in MSCI ESG rankings within China’s tire industry, while also placing it among the top companies in the global tire sector.

Widely recognized as a benchmark framework for evaluating corporate sustainability, MSCI ESG ratings serve not only as a key reference for international institutional investors in their investment decisions, but also as an authoritative measure of a company’s sustainable development performance and long-term value.

Following its upgrade to an A rating in 2025, Sailun Group’s further advancement to AA represents strong recognition from international capital markets of its comprehensive capabilities in ESG governance, execution, and value creation.

This accomplishment reflects Sailun Group’s long-term commitment to embedding sustainability principles across all aspects of its operations, including global expansion, research and development, manufacturing, labor management, and supply chain management.

Looking ahead, Sailun Group will continue to advance its “eco+ Sustainable Development Strategy,” leveraging its industry leadership to support the global tire sector in moving toward a new phase of high-quality, sustainable development.
